head.text: Disinclined for mental work. Irritable. Dull headache deep in brain

eyes.text: Pain in eyes and orbits, with conjunctivitis. Dull sunken eyes. Styes

mouth_throat.text: Herpes on lips. Burning on the tongue. Pain in mouth, as from a splinter (Nit ac)

male.text: Desire increased, with loss of power. Dull backache, as after excessive coitus

chest_heart.text: Lancinating pain throughout right lung toward the liver, stopping breathing. Violent palpitation; sensation of heaviness in stomach

skin.text: Numb hands and feet. Hangnails inflamed; itching and redness of roots of nails

keynotes.text: color="#800000">UPAS TIEUT Upas-tree-Strychnos Tiente (UPAS TIENTE) Produces tonic spasms, tetanus, and asphyxia.
